image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about the forgetting curve than social media ever will.
Context visual: The forgetting curve shows how quickly we lose information over time.
Escalation visual: After just 20 minutes, we forget 40% of what we learn. Surprised?
Evidence visual: This was discovered by Hermann Ebbinghaus in the 1880s, revealing our brain's limits.
Payoff visual: But, spaced repetition can help combat this. It’s all about timing!
Cta visual: Want to remember better? Follow for more science secrets that can change your learning!
